concepts_used.title: 常微分方程建模基础
concepts_used.how_used: 建立离散差分方程模型，将国家债务变化表示为上一期债务、政府支出、税收和利息的函数。

concepts_used.title: 灰色预测 GM(1,1)
concepts_used.how_used: 使用Hauser's Law将税收收入表示为GDP的固定比例（19.5%），简化模型。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Applying Hauser's Law to equation [3] allows us to replace T(t) with a multiple of GDP in billions of dollars which is represented by y(t): \frac{\Delta D}{\Delta t}=G_{sp}(t)-.195*y(t)+(D(t-1)*I(t)) [4]

concepts_used.title: Logistic 增长模型
concepts_used.how_used: 假设GDP以恒定增长率增长，建立指数增长微分方程并求解。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We use the value of GDP growth in the following differential equations in order to determine a function for the GDP with respect to time. \frac{dy}{dt}=.029 y ... y = 14000 e^{.029 t}

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变GDP增长率和利率参数（高、低、平均）创建多个扩展模型，分析债务对参数的敏感性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: These different extensions allow for us to determine the sensitivity of the national debt to each of our three different variables.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出8条一般假设和每个扩展的特定假设，每条假设附有详细理由。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: II. General Assumptions and Justifications 1. The United States Government borrows money from various sources in order to pay off whatever expenditures are not covered by the federal income. ...

concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：问题重述、假设、模型建立、求解、结果、结论、参考文献。
